## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `bash -n teams_onboarding_flow.sh`
- [ ] Tested on macOS Bash 3.2 when script behavior changed
- [ ] README updated for user-facing behavior
- [ ] Guide updated for process changes

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No real MAC addresses
- [ ] No SIP usernames, auth names, or passwords
- [ ] No full onboarding tokens
- [ ] No names, phone numbers, tenant domains, or verification codes
- [ ] No generated `.cfg`, `.env`, `.log`, `.pcap`, `.tar`, or diagnostics files

## Tested device information

Model:
Firmware:
MAC: <masked>

Bash version:
